products.name: Lavender Mosaic Co-ord Set
products.description: A contemporary co-ord set featuring soft lavender geometric prints, designed for effortless everyday elegance. Crafted for comfort and style, perfect for casual outings and weekend gatherings.

products.name: Azure Bloom Midi Dress
products.description: A charming floral midi dress in refreshing blue tones. Designed with delicate details and a flattering silhouette that blends comfort with feminine elegance.

products.name: Aqua Grace Skirt Set
products.description: A sophisticated combination of a textured aqua top and flowing ivory skirt. A versatile outfit ideal for brunches, celebrations, and relaxed gatherings.

products.name: Ivory Heritage Saree
products.description: A classic ivory saree paired with a rich contrast blouse, celebrating tradition with understated elegance. Perfect for festive occasions and cultural events.

products.name: Urban Print Maxi Dress
products.description: A modern sleeveless maxi dress featuring artistic geometric patterns. Designed for women who appreciate contemporary fashion with everyday comfort.
